title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Lybrate - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Lybrate - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Lybrate invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Backend Developer at our Ranchi location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Lybrate:
Lybrate is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Implement new features based on product requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Git

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lybrate!
